title: Go Home Quickly
description: This is a mod that can help you get home quickly.
body: Have you ever been unable to find your home after leaving? This mod helps you solve the problem. Its v3.0.1/v3.0.0 version can use the command:**/home <name> <x y z>** to create a home, and can create multiple homes at the same time. Use the command:**/home** to list all the homes created. Use the command:**/home <name>** to return to the home you set. Use the command:**/rmhome <name>** to delete the home. Use the command:**/namehome <oldname> <newname>** to rename the house. Use the command:**/deshome <name> <description>** to add descriptions, which will be displayed during transmission.
